About Me

Hey. Hi. I am Zachary or Zack (Why a K? Long story.) I am Web/UI Designer/Developer/Engineer. I recently worked for Bindable. I currently live in Boston, MA area.

When I am not working I can be found at the gym, hiking and camping in the White Mountains where I am currently working on completing the NH 48 over 4000. I know its a lot of hiking. My favorite hike so far is Mount Washington via Ammonosuc Ravine and Jewell Trail. The last few years I have done the fundraising Hike-a-thon for the MWOBS called Seek the Peak. I have participated the last 2 years.

I love both digital and film photography and enjoy both. I am always looking for new and interesting ways to use and further develop my skills not only in the web but also as a photographer.

You can check out some of my photography on my Instagram.

My Job History/Resumé/CV if you want to learn more in detail. Yes...those last two are true.
